---
title: "Lecture 4: Bobbish"
date: "2026-05-22"
order: 4
description: "Slide-deck companion to Lesson 4 — a 20-slide tour of Bobbish: the five rules, the HK-47 modifier system, citation-as-vocabulary, and where the language sits typologically. For live delivery."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobbology, language, bobbish]
path: /assets/bobbish.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/bobbish.pdf">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/bobbish-in-4-voices.html">long-form lecture (4 voices)</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/bobbish.pdf");</script>
```
